overall.description: A stationary third-person view of a grand Gothic hall from a video game, featuring stone architecture, arched windows, and scattered furniture. Characters in dark robes move through the dimly lit interior space, creating a mystical atmosphere typical of a wizarding school setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with gothic architecture and dining tables

events.description: robed character walks from left side into center view of the hall

agents.ego_description: stationary third-person perspective observing the hall and moving characters

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking across the stone floor from left to center
character standing near the back pillars observing the hall

entered.detail: tall arched windows with circular decorative tops at the far end of the hall
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
circular wooden dining tables scattered throughout the hall
ornate stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
wall-mounted torch or fireplace providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a stationary third-person view of a grand Gothic hall with high stone ceilings and massive pillars. Tall arched windows dominate the far wall while round wooden tables fill the floor space. Characters in dark wizard robes walk through the hall, with one figure entering from the left and crossing toward the center. The scene is dimly lit by wall-mounted torches, creating a mystical atmosphere in this indoor public space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a grand Gothic hall, capturing a moment of quiet movement within a mystical, dimly lit interior. It begins by establishing the scale of the space, focusing on the high stone ceilings and massive pillars that frame the architecture. As the view lingers, the focus shifts toward the far wall dominated by tall arched windows and the round wooden tables scattered across the floor. The scene then becomes dynamic as a figure in dark wizard robes enters from the left and crosses toward the center of the hall. Finally, the atmosphere is solidified by the flickering light of wall-mounted torches that cast deep shadows across the stone surfaces.
